summary: Verified bug fixes for MapControls UI and trip-info panel positioning. All requested features working correctly: MapControls auto-collapse during driving mode, hamburger toggle expands controls, button order correct, trip-info panel (Fuel Cost & HOS) positioned at bottom-right, arrival HUD shows speed/distance/time/ETA.

issues: Minor bounding box overlap detected between MapControls (y=344-844) and TripInfo panel (y=760-900) - visually acceptable as MapControls has higher z-index (2010 vs 2000) and panels don't visually interfere

critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx - Auto-collapse on isDrivingMode via useEffect at line 36-38
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx - Hamburger toggle (data-testid='map-controls-toggle') at line 46-53
VERIFIED: MapControls.tsx - Button order: hamburger, filter (collapsible), divider, zoom+, level, zoom-, overview (collapsible), 2D (collapsible), follow (collapsible), heading, compass (collapsible)
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6218 - Trip-info panel positioned at bottom-[180px] md:bottom-[180px] with right-2 md:right-4
VERIFIED: NavigationView.tsx line 6713 - isDrivingMode prop passed to MapControls as (isDriving && milesRemaining > 0)
VERIFIED: Arrival HUD shows speed, distance (907.1 mi), duration (13h 13m), ETA (5:08 PM)

test_credentials.guest: Click 'Continue as Guest' button on login screen

context_for_next_testing_agent: App at https://hud-customizer-5.preview.emergentagent.com. Bug fixes verified: 1) MapControls auto-collapse during driving mode - only hamburger, zoom +/-, zoom level, and heading buttons visible when collapsed, 2) Hamburger toggle (data-testid='map-controls-toggle') expands to show filter, overview, 2D, follow, compass buttons, 3) Trip-info panel (Fuel Cost & HOS) positioned at bottom-[180px] right-4 with z-index 2000, 4) MapControls positioned with z-index 2010 (above trip-info), 5) Arrival HUD at bottom center shows speed/distance/time/ETA. Test flow: Guest login -> Navigation tab -> search 'Houston TX' -> press Enter (auto-routes). IP geolocation fallback places user in Council Bluffs, Iowa.

map_controls_auto_collapse.details: During driving mode (isDriving && milesRemaining > 0), collapsible controls (filter, overview, 2D, follow, compass) are hidden. Only hamburger, zoom +/-, zoom level, and heading buttons remain visible.

hamburger_toggle.details: data-testid='map-controls-toggle' found. Clicking expands all collapsible controls (overview, follow, compass become visible).

button_order.details: Button order verified: map-controls-toggle, zoom-in-btn, zoom-out-btn, overview-btn, follow-user-btn, orientation-btn, compass-mode-btn

trip_info_panel_position.details: Panel positioned at x=1680, y=760 (bottom-right). Shows Fuel Cost ($491.21) and HOS Status (11h 0m drive left).

arrival_hud.details: Arrival HUD at bottom (y=960) shows: speed (0), distance (907.1 mi), duration (13h 13m), ETA (5:08 PM)

navigation_hud.details: Turn instruction 'W Broadway. Go for 1312 ft.' displayed at top of screen

no_visual_overlap.details: TripInfo and ArrivalHUD do NOT overlap. MapControls and ArrivalHUD do NOT overlap. Minor bounding box overlap between MapControls and TripInfo is acceptable due to z-index layering.
